args.newText:
## [Unreleased]

## [0.21.7] - 2026-05-28

### Added
- Added Darwin bootstrap preflight checks for first-time nix-darwin activation blockers, including unmanaged `/etc/bashrc`, unmanaged `/etc/zshrc`, and `/etc/synthetic.conf` readiness.
- Added `nex doctor --fix darwin-bootstrap` to repair Darwin bootstrap blockers before activation.

### Changed
- `nex init` now prompts to repair Darwin bootstrap blockers before first activation, `nex switch` fails fast with a repair command when blockers remain, and `nex adopt` surfaces bootstrap recommendations during machine adoption.

## [0.21.6] - 2026-05-28

args.message: feat(homebrew): offer migrate or quarantine reset during bootstrap

preview: Committed 12 file(s): 0ef266fbf398b600706901a667ac29ef11dd166d

args.command: gh issue comment 16 --body 'Implemented in commit 0ef266f. First-time macOS activation now detects unmanaged Homebrew before switch and offers migrate/reset/abort. Migrate patches nix-homebrew.autoMigrate = true. Reset no longer deletes Homebrew directly; it inventories formulae/casks/leaves/taps/config under ~/.local/state/nex and moves the Homebrew repo/brew shim aside with timestamped backups so rollback remains possible. Also wired into nex init, nex switch, nex adopt recommendations, and nex doctor --fix homebrew-bootstrap.'

details.command: gh issue comment 16 --body 'Implemented in commit 0ef266f. First-time macOS activation now detects unmanaged Homebrew before switch and offers migrate/reset/abort. Migrate patches nix-homebrew.autoMigrate = true. Reset no longer deletes Homebrew directly; it inventories formulae/casks/leaves/taps/config under ~/.local/state/nex and moves the Homebrew repo/brew shim aside with timestamped backups so rollback remains possible. Also wired into nex init, nex switch, nex adopt recommendations, and nex doctor --fix homebrew-bootstrap.'

args.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('Cargo.toml')
s=p.read_text().replace('version = "0.21.7"','version = "0.21.8"',1)
p.write_text(s)
ch=Path('CHANGELOG.md')
s=ch.read_text()
if '## [0.21.8]' not in s:
    s=s.replace('## [Unreleased]\n\n', '## [Unreleased]\n\n## [0.21.8] - 2026-05-28\n\n### Added\n- First-time macOS Homebrew bootstrap preflight detects unmanaged Homebrew before activation and offers migrate, reset, or abort.\n- `nex doctor --fix homebrew-bootstrap` can enable `nix-homebrew.autoMigrate` or quarantine an unmanaged Homebrew after writing inventory backups.\n\n### Fixed\n- `nex install` now prefers Homebrew casks when the nixpkgs candidate is a redirect/stub telling users to install the cask.\n\n## [0.21.7] - 2026-05-28\n\n',1)
ch.write_text(s)
site=Path('site/src/pages/index.astro')
s=site.read_text()
s=s.replace('v0.21.7 patch release','v0.21.8 patch release')
s=s.replace('First-time macOS bootstrap fix','First-time macOS Homebrew bootstrap fix')
s=s.replace('detects and repairs Darwin activation blockers before first switch.', 'detects unmanaged Homebrew before activation and offers migrate, quarantine reset, or abort.')
site.write_text(s)
PY
cargo check --quiet && cd site && pnpm build
